content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py only.

agent2: pushed my change to core.py - added 'transformers' keyword-only param to Encoding.encode() (Callable[[str],str] | Sequence[Callable] | None, applied at the top of the method before allowed/disallowed_special checks). Only touched the encode() method body/signature and its docstring, nothing else in the file. Should merge cleanly with a return_positions param as long as you add yours as another keyword-only arg. Will merge team/agent1 into my branch before final patch - ping me when you've pushed.

agent2: merged your return_positions change into agent2 branch, resolved the encode() signature/docstring conflict, both features tested together and full test suite (32 tests) passes. patch.txt is finalized. Thanks for the heads up!
